trigger_condition: Middle-click or modified click opens results in new tab
guard_snippet: Use <button type=\"submit\"> + location.assign or intercept auxclick

trigger_condition: User selects both chips and No known allergies via rapid toggles
guard_snippet: On chip click set noAllergy.checked=false; on noAllergy true clear chips (already partial)
potential_consequence: Ambiguous state until server canonical rule

trigger_condition: Keyboard user activates link before checkbox without script running
guard_snippet: Use <button disabled> until checked; href only after enable
potential_consequence: Navigation without acknowledgement in edge browsers

trigger_condition: All food-group chips toggled off after load
guard_snippet: Disable Save until ≥1 chip pressed true
potential_consequence: User hits Save repeatedly with only toast delay feedback

trigger_condition: Query param set without user recipe payload
guard_snippet: Read from sessionStorage draft or separate detail-mine.html

trigger_condition: Only keyboard: focus moves through hidden radio layout
guard_snippet: Ensure visible focus ring on span via :focus-within on label
potential_consequence: Focus indicator unclear on some browsers

guard_snippet: Noscript fallback shows full disclaimer inline
potential_consequence: Users never see expanded legal copy

guard_snippet: Prototype OK; note real app needs offline messaging
potential_consequence: False sense of completed auth in demos

guard_snippet: maxlength attributes aligned with PRD 500 for likes not recipe fields
potential_consequence: Layout breakage or DOM performance issues

guard_snippet: Guard page with query param or session flag
